mapper.sql: select t.task_id, t.task_no, t.issue_ids, t.rect_dept_id, (select d.dept_name from sys_dept d where d.dept_id = t.rect_dept_id and d.del_flag = '0') as rect_dept_name, t.contact_person, t.contact_phone, t.task_requirement, t.deadline, t.notice_file_path, t.status, t.dispatch_user_id, t.dispatch_time, t.confirm_time, t.del_flag, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark from rect_task t
mapper.select: select distinct t.task_id, t.task_no, t.issue_ids, t.rect_dept_id, t.contact_person, t.contact_phone, (select d.dept_name from sys_dept d where d.dept_id = t.rect_dept_id and d.del_flag = '0') as rect_dept_name, t.task_requirement, t.deadline, t.notice_file_path, t.status, t.dispatch_user_id, t.dispatch_time, t.confirm_time, t.del_flag, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark from rect_task t where t.rect_dept_id = #{deptId} and t.del_flag = '0' and ( exists ( select 1 from rect_report r where r.task_id = t.task_id and r.del_flag = '0' and r.submit_time is not null ) or exists ( select 1 from rect_extension e where e.task_id = t.task_id and e.del_flag = '0' and e.status = '0' ) ) order by coalesce(t.update_time, t.confirm_time, t.dispatch_time, t.create_time) desc, t.task_id desc

select distinct t.task_id, t.task_no, t.issue_ids, t.rect_dept_id, t.contact_person, t.contact_phone, (select d.dept_name from sys_dept d where d.dept_id = t.rect_dept_id and d.del_flag = '0') as rect_dept_name, t.task_requirement, t.deadline, t.notice_file_path, t.status, t.dispatch_user_id, t.dispatch_time, t.confirm_time, t.del_flag, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark from rect_task t inner join rect_plan p on p.task_id = t.task_id where p.responsible_user_id = #{userId} and p.del_flag = '0' and t.del_flag = '0' order by coalesce(t.update_time, t.confirm_time, t.dispatch_time, t.create_time) desc, t.task_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into rect_task ( task_no, issue_ids, rect_dept_id, contact_person, contact_phone, task_requirement, deadline, notice_file_path, status, dispatch_user_id, dispatch_time, confirm_time, del_flag, create_by, remark, create_time )values( #{taskNo}, #{issueIds}, #{rectDeptId}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{taskRequirement}, #{deadline}, #{noticeFilePath}, #{status}, #{dispatchUserId}, #{dispatchTime}, #{confirmTime}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
update rect_task set del_flag = '2' where task_id in
#{taskId}
